content:
# PiPilot IDE — Feature Analysis

Here's how PiPilot stacks up against the competition:

---

## Core IDE Features

| Feature | PiPilot | VS Code | Cursor | Windsurf |
|---------|---------|---------|--------|----------|
| **Platform** | Browser-based | Desktop | Desktop | Desktop |
| **Editor** | Monaco | Monaco | Monaco | Monaco |
| **Terminal** | Server PTY | Native | Native | Native |
| **File Storage** | IndexedDB + linked folders | Local filesystem | Local filesystem | Local filesystem |

## AI Integration

| Feature | PiPilot | VS Code | Cursor | Windsurf |
|---------|---------|---------|--------|----------|
| **AI Model** | Claude Agent SDK | Extensions | Claude | Claude |
| **Tool Execution** | Client-side file ops | Extensions | Built-in | Built-in |
| **Chat Interface** | Built-in | Extensions | Built-in | Built-in |
| **Slash Commands** | Yes | No | Yes | Yes |

## Version Control

| Feature | PiPilot | VS Code | Cursor | Windsurf |
|---------|---------|---------|--------|----------|
| **Git** | Browser (isomorphic-git) | Native | Native | Native |
| **Checkpoints** | Built-in (unique) | Via Git | Via Git | Via Git |
| **Branching UI** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |

## Deployment

| Feature | PiPilot | VS Code | Cursor | Windsurf |
|---------|---------|---------|--------|----------|
| **Cloud Deploy** | Built-in | Extensions | Extensions | Extensions |
| **Dev Server** | Per-project | Extensions | Extensions | Extensions |

## Extensions

| Feature | PiPilot | VS Code | Cursor | Windsurf |
|---------|---------|---------|--------|----------|
| **Extensions API** | Custom | VS Code | VS Code | VS Code |
| **Built-in Plugins** | bookmarks, snippets, etc. | Limited | Limited | Limited |

---

## Key Differentiators for PiPilot

1. **Browser-first** — Works in any browser, no desktop installation
2. **Hybrid storage** — Local IndexedDB OR link to existing folder
3. **Checkpoint system** — Built-in versioning without Git
4. **Built-in deploy** — One-click cloud deployment
5. **Design** — Distinctive "Editorial Terminal" aesthetic with electric lime accents

---

## What PiPilot Does Better

- **No setup** — Open in browser, start building
- **Linked projects** — Work on existing folders without importing
- **Checkpoint undo** — Restore file state without Git commits
- **Integrated deployment** — Deploy without configuring extensions

## What Others Do Better

- **Native performance** — Desktop apps are faster
- **Native Git** — Real git with large repos
- **Extension ecosystem** — Thousands of VS Code extensions
- **Offline** — Works without internet

---

The analysis is saved to your plan file at `C:\Users\big\.claude\plans\zesty-churning-map.md`.
